impact: This gives the supervisor deterministic recovery rules after repeated SyntaxError, py_compile, or TypeScript parser failures: stop broad retries, require smaller syntactically valid proposals, prefer fixture/sentinel-first sequencing, and add explicit preflight expectations before worker attempts continue.
summary: Tighten PP&D supervisor repair guidance for repeated syntax and compile rollbacks.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 3 recent validation rollbacks were syntax or compile failures; patch daemon prompt, preflight, or repair guidance before more worker attempts

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
